findings.problem: The tip exchange paraphrases a calibration-only Faye example from outline/style_bible.json rather than generating fresh scene-born speech. The beat at lines 247-251 reproduces the distinctive skeleton of the forbidden sample about nobody tipping at the Golden Ox, which the review contract explicitly treats as a HIGH issue.
findings.rewrite_direction: Recompose the exchange beginning at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:247 so Faye's fixation on the tip comes out of this exact diner pressure, not the style-bible wording. Preserve the dramatic function, but replace the recognizable 'nobody tipped there / she did' structure at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:247 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:251 with a new attack line, inference, or misread that is not an echo of the calibration sample.
findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised exchange beginning at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:247 no longer uses the recognizable structure 'Nobody tipped [there/at the Golden Ox]. She did.' or any close paraphrase of the style-bible sample, while still making clear by the end of the beat that Faye reads the tip as evidence the other woman knew service work. Fail if a cold reader can still map the revised wording directly back to the calibration line.

findings.problem: The records-office turn is locally vivid but under-justified. After a standard form and current biometrics, a public Mars office can pull an Earth-side cryogenic misconduct audit plus an eleven-year utilization log, but the chapter never makes clear why this office has that jurisdiction, why Faye qualifies for the pull now, or why the same misuse was not surfaced at revival. Because the chapter's central discovery depends on this access path, the reveal reads partly like a plot handout.
findings.rewrite_direction: At the setup around snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:331 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:351, or in the reveal around snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:397, add the missing causal chain: what legal or administrative channel routes suspended-patient fraud reviews through Mars civil identity, why current biometric and voice confirmation are enough for Faye to unlock it now, and why the file was not proactively delivered when she woke. Keep the shabby-office texture, but make the access logic explicit on the page.
findings.acceptance_test: Pass if, after reading the revised material anchored at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:331, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:351, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:397, a cold reader can answer three questions from the chapter alone: why this office can access the audit, why Faye is eligible to receive it now, and why the misuse did not already arrive with her revival paperwork. Fail if any of those answers still requires off-page inference.

findings.problem: Miriam and the records clerk converge into the same polished dry-deadpan register, and both major conversations repeatedly resolve through the same question-to-translation-to-neat-closer ladder. Miriam's 'For what it's worth' beat and the clerk's 'If you want outrage,' 'Why costs extra,' and 'just making me late' all read like authored mini-speeches in a shared cadence rather than two distinct side-character voices under pressure.
findings.rewrite_direction: Differentiate the diner exchange beginning at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:243 and the office exchange beginning at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:413. Let Miriam stay rooted in service-work habit, customer-reading, and counter rhythm, while the clerk stays procedural, scope-limiting, and institution-shaped. Break at least one of the clean explanation ladders at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:295, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:431, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:519 with interruption, refusal, misread, or physical action so the scenes stop resolving every prompt into a quotable line.
findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised material around snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:243 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:413 gives Miriam at least two lines whose vocabulary could only belong to a career waitress and the clerk at least two lines whose vocabulary could only belong to a bureaucrat, and if at least one major exchange in either scene ends in interruption or unresolved friction instead of a neat explanatory closer. Fail if the highlighted beats could still be swapped between Miriam and the clerk with little loss.

findings.problem: The after-hours records-office coda keeps restating the same identity fracture after the chapter has already landed it. Once the clerk leaves and Faye has the papers, the passage from lines 565-645 cycles through office language versus lived life, the other woman's survival, the lack of a scar, and the split ownership of the name without adding enough new fact, decision, or external consequence to justify its length.
findings.rewrite_direction: Compress or refocus the closing sequence beginning at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:565. Keep the sit-with-it beat required by the chapter spine, but make each paragraph after snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:565 earn its space by adding either a new inference not already explicit by snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:533, a fresh physical consequence, or a concrete next-step pressure. Cut restatements that only rephrase the same wound.
findings.acceptance_test: Pass if every paragraph in the revised closing sequence starting at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:565 introduces at least one of the following: a new inference, a new material consequence, or a new decision/next-step pressure that was not already clear by snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:557. Fail if consecutive paragraphs still merely restate that another woman lived under Faye's name.

findings.problem: The chapter lands key observations three times in the same negation-then-correction mold: 'Not older. Just used harder,' 'Not weak. Just tired,' and 'Not memory ... Just accumulated use.' Once or twice would read as choice; by the third recurrence it registers as a prose tic and starts flattening the chapter's rhythm.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework the beats anchored at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:115, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:263, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:605 so they do not all arrive through the same 'Not X. Just Y.' correction. Keep the insight, but let at least one of these moments land through image, action, or a different sentence shape.
findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised passages anchored at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:115, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:263, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:605 contain no more than two key realizations delivered through the explicit negation/correction template, and at least one of the three beats is rendered through concrete image or action instead. Fail if all three moments still resolve in the same sentence mold.

summary: FAIL on all four lenses. The chapter has strong tactile Faye interiority and hits its continuity obligations, but it does not clear pass level because the records-office revelation is under-justified, the dialogue echoes calibration material and overuses the same polished explanatory ladder, the after-hours coda restates rather than escalates, and a repeated negation-correction sentence template starts to flatten the prose.
